overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk ramen shop interior from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. The player moves through a dimly lit kitchen area with neon signage, past cooking equipment and ramen bowls, approaching a service counter with NPC customers. The environment features characteristic yellow-green neon lighting, Japanese signage, and detailed cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: back kitchen prep area with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the back kitchen area, observing the equipment and neon signage

entered.detail: circular neon sign with Japanese ramen characters in pink and yellow
television screen displaying advertisements mounted on tiled wall
metal preparation table with trays and cooking supplies
commercial deep fryer or oven unit against the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in the back kitchen of a cyberpunk ramen shop. A bright neon ramen sign glows on the left wall while a television displays ads straight ahead. The camera moves forward past a preparation table on the left and kitchen equipment on the right, revealing a cluttered but functional cooking space with scattered trash on the floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: kitchen cooking area with ramen preparation

events.description: camera focuses on three bowls of ramen sitting on a metal counter

agents.ego_description: examining the prepared ramen bowls on the metal counter

entered.detail: three white bowls filled with ramen noodles and toppings on a metal tray
commercial gas stove with burners and cooking surface
stainless steel preparation counter with trays

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the kitchen, the camera focuses on three freshly prepared bowls of ramen sitting on a stainless steel counter. The stovetop and cooking equipment line the walls as the neon sign and TV from the previous area fall out of view behind the camera.

events.description: camera turns slightly toward the service counter revealing NPCs in the background

agents.ego_description: moving past the cooking station toward the front counter where NPCs are visible

notable_agents.action: two customers standing at the service counter waiting to order

entered.detail: large black wok or frying pan with food cooking on the stove
commercial cooking range with multiple burners and controls
metal table with cooking supplies and utensils

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the ramen preparation area to a cooking station featuring a large frying pan on the stove. As the camera turns slightly right, two NPC customers become visible standing at the service counter in the distance, marking the transition from the back kitchen to the customer service area.

scene_state.functional_zone: service counter with red paper lanterns

events.description: red paper lanterns become clearly visible hanging above the service counter

agents.ego_description: approaching the service counter where two NPCs stand under red lanterns

notable_agents.action: two customers standing at the counter facing the service window

entered.detail: main service counter with pass-through window to the kitchen
traditional red Japanese paper lanterns hanging above the counter
glowing neon signs visible through the service window
metal trays with prepared food items on the counter

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the front service counter where two NPCs stand waiting. Red paper lanterns hang overhead, casting a warm glow, while neon signs are visible through the service window. The camera moves past food trays on the counter, completing the journey from the back kitchen to the customer-facing area of the ramen shop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the cluttered depths of a cyberpunk kitchen toward the warm, customer-facing service area of a ramen shop. It begins in the back kitchen, gliding past a glowing neon ramen sign and a television displaying ads while moving through a functional space filled with preparation tables and scattered trash. As the camera pushes deeper, the focus shifts to three freshly prepared bowls of ramen on a stainless steel counter, leaving the initial signage and screens behind. The scene then opens up as the camera passes a cooking station with a large frying pan, turning slightly right to reveal two NPC customers waiting in the distance. Finally, the movement concludes at the front service counter, where red paper lanterns cast a warm glow over food trays and neon signs shimmer through the service window.
